description.en: Claim tokens that you have earned from sales or auctions on the marketplace.
description.de: Token beanspruchen, die du durch Verkäufe oder Auktionen auf dem Marktplatz verdient hast.
description.es: Claim tokens that you have earned from sales or auctions on the marketplace.
description.fr: Claim tokens that you have earned from sales or auctions on the marketplace.
description.ro: Claim tokens that you have earned from sales or auctions on the marketplace.
description.it: Claim tokens that you have earned from sales or auctions on the marketplace.

description.en: Address to receive the claimed tokens.
description.de: Adresse, die die beanspruchten Token erhält.
description.es: Address to receive the claimed tokens.
description.fr: Address to receive the claimed tokens.
description.ro: Address to receive the claimed tokens.
description.it: Address to receive the claimed tokens.

description.en: Token identifier and nonce pairs to claim (format: tokenId,nonce).
description.de: Token-Kennung und Nonce-Paare zum Beanspruchen (Format: tokenId,nonce).
description.es: Token identifier and nonce pairs to claim (format: tokenId,nonce).
description.fr: Token identifier and nonce pairs to claim (format: tokenId,nonce).
description.ro: Token identifier and nonce pairs to claim (format: tokenId,nonce).
description.it: Token identifier and nonce pairs to claim (format: tokenId,nonce).
